# Weekly AI Recap - Cursor AI Agents, Anthropic Cowork, ChatGPT Ads, Grok Deepfakes - #111

## 节目信息
- **节目**: The AI Cookbook: AI Tools | Enterprise AI | Leadership
- **日期**: 2026-01-17
- **时长**: 22分钟
- **链接**: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/weekly-ai-recap-cursor-ai-agents-anthropic-cowork-chatgpt/id1823547405?i=1000745501785&uo=4

## 描述
AI agents just built a complete web browser — 3 million lines of code — in ONE WEEK. But first, they failed spectacularly. The lesson? It's not about smarter AI. It's about smarter AI organization. Plus: OpenAI adds ads, Google mines your Gmail, and the UK makes deepfakes illegal overnight.
🎙️ ABOUT THE HOST
